The '''TIE Subfighter''' was a submersible attack craft. It was armed with a [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launcher and a single [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]].<ref name="AJ9" />

{{Ship-stub}}
